channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in CSS (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in CSS nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 spiritov/ds.css (433 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: spiritov

📝 Repository: spiritov/ds.css

📄 Descrizione: A css framework recreating the DS / DS Lite's UI

]]>

item.title: 📝 inflictx/Arsenal (107 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: inflictx

📝 Repository: inflictx/Arsenal

📄 Descrizione: Offline-first, searchable arsenal for pentesting & bug bounty: payloads, a click-to-build command generator, GTFOBins, wordlists, embedded CyberChef, reverse shells, checklists & an engagement tracker.

🍴 Forks: 12

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

item.title: 📝 whiteg2030-alt/Baiwuchang-PPT-HTML (15 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: whiteg2030-alt

📝 Repository: whiteg2030-alt/Baiwuchang-PPT-HTML

📄 Descrizione: 4个风格极简美学PPT，01极简风格 02暖橙渐变风格 03蓝色渐变风格 04彩色渐变 。非常适合设计师，选择的字体是开源思源黑体，粗细对比，适合专业设计师、数码产品、发布会、年总总结等。 不仅是一个html文件，还会导出一个ppt 是可以编辑的。方便后期修改。

⭐ Stelle: 15

🍴 Forks: 1

💻 Linguaggio: CSS

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-06-26T10:31:41Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-01T13:31:43Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
